title: Work with the Windows PowerShell pipeline
summary: This learning path explains the purpose and use of the PowerShell pipeline and use the pipeline to sort, filter, enumerate and display output data for PowerShell cmdlets.

sections.title: Work with the Windows PowerShell pipeline
sections.summary: This learning path explains the purpose and use of the PowerShell pipeline and use the pipeline to sort, filter, enumerate and display output data for PowerShell cmdlets.

lessons.title: Understand the Windows PowerShell pipeline
lessons.content_md:
This module explains about the Windows PowerShell pipeline and some basic techniques for running multiple commands in it.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-windows-powershell-pipeline/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Select, sort, and measure objects using the pipeline
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to manipulate objects in the pipeline by using commands that sort, select, and measure objects.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/select-sort-measure-objects-use-pipeline/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Select, sort, and measure objects using the pipeline

lessons.title: Filter objects out of the pipeline
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to filter objects out of the pipeline by using the Where-Object cmdlet to specify various criteria.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/filter-objects-out-of-pipeline/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Filter objects out of the pipeline

lessons.title: Enumerate objects in the pipeline
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to enumerate objects in the pipeline so that you can work with one object at a time during automation.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enumerate-objects-pipeline/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Send and pass data as output from the pipeline
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to send pipeline data to files and in various output formats.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/send-pass-data-output-from-pipeline/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Send and pass data as output from the pipeline

lessons.title: Pass pipeline objects
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how the Windows PowerShell command-line interface passes objects from one command to another in the pipeline.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/pass-pipeline-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Work with the Windows PowerShell pipeline
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Work with the Windows PowerShell pipeline**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
